ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "binary_package" TEXT /* Binary package file name with checksum */,
  "source_package" TEXT /* Source package file name with checksum */,
  "version" TEXT /* Module version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Installation instructions for the module */,
  "usage_guidelines" TEXT /* Usage guidelines for the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of the repository (e.g., Binary, Source) */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "repository_username" TEXT /* Username for repository authentication */,
  "repository_password" TEXT /* Password for repository authentication */,
  "repository_description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installation_methods" (
  "installation_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation method */,
  "installation_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the installation method */,
  "installation_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the installation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation event */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being installed */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository from where the module was installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "installation_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installation method used */,
  "installation_status" TEXT /* Status of the installation (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_installation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_method_id") REFERENCES installation_methods ("installation_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of how the module is being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the module is being used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usages_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "team_membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., Developer, QA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency record */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent module */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., Compile-time, Runtime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_dependencies_dependent_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_dependencies_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)
